_comment: Edition='pro' overlay applied on top of en.json when VITE_APP_EDITION=pro. Replaces household-flavored Circles vocabulary with enterprise/banking-friendly equivalents (visibility / team / organization / confidential). Keys not listed here fall through to en.json. See src/i18n/index.ts merge logic.

circles.settingsSubtitle: Manage visibility levels and who is invited into each.
circles.defaultCaptureHint: New entries are captured at this visibility by default.
circles.noMembers: No members in your visibility levels yet.
circles.peersSubtitle: Paired {{appName}} instances from other organization members.
circles.peersManageHint: You pair new peers from the visibility settings page:
circles.pairingSubtitle: Pair your {{appName}} with another organization member's for federated queries.
circles.pairInitiateStep3Instruction: Almost done — what visibility do you want to grant {{name}}?
circles.pairAcceptStep2Instruction: Accept pairing with {{name}}. What visibility do you want to grant them?
